title: nepeta stachyoides
intro: Nepeta stachyoides, also known as mintleaf catmint, is a perennial herb that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic qualities, which are attributed to the presence of essential oils such as nepetalactone and ursolic acid. The health benefits of Nepeta stachyoides include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and stress, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Nepeta stachyoides can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used as a topical application or added to skincare products for its purported benefits.
